title: Schnit'z Artifacts
description: Discover powerful artifacts in structures, combine them with armor to unlock powerful effects!
body:
**Uncover ancient artifacts scattered throughout the world, each with unique powers when combined with armor to enhance your adventures!**

_Artifacts currently available:_

**Eldarion's Artifact**: Activate _Night Vision_, perfect for exploring caves or navigating in the dark.

**Xypher's Artifact**: Gain _Dolphin's Grace_, enabling you to glide swiftly through water with ease.

**Arkho's Artifact**: Enjoy _Absorption_, adding temporary extra health to withstand fierce battles.

_Artifacts will soon be found in loot tables within various structures. For now, you can use the /give command or access creative mode to experiment with these powerful effects!_


All sounds in the mod are custom-made to enhance the immersion and make each artifact feel truly unique. Each artifact not only grants a special effect but also has distinct characteristics, such as activation sounds, visual glows, and durability that vary from one to another. This way, every discovery feels fresh and impactful, encouraging players to experiment with different combinations and uncover the full potential of each artifact.
